title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Go First Cargo

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Go First Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Go First Cargo family as a Fleet Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Go First Cargo:
Go First Cargo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Go First Cargo!
